hover.markdown:
```python
class FunctionDeclaration(
    *,
    behavior: Behavior | None = None,
    description: str | None = None,
    name: str | None = None,
    parameters: Schema | None = None,
    parameters_json_schema: Any | None = None,
    response: Schema | None = None,
    response_json_schema: Any | None = None
)
```
---
Defines a function that the model can generate JSON inputs for.

The inputs are based on `OpenAPI 3.0 specifications
<https://spec.openapis.org/oas/v3.0.3>`\_.

```python
class Schema(
    *,
    additional_properties: Any | None = None,
    defs: dict[str, Schema] | None = None,
    ref: str | None = None,
    any_of: list[Schema] | None = None,
    default: Any | None = None,
    description: str | None = None,
    enum: list[str] | None = None,
    example: Any | None = None,
    format: str | None = None,
    items: Schema | None = None,
    max_items: int | None = None,
    max_length: int | None = None,
    max_properties: int | None = None,
    maximum: float | None = None,
    min_items: int | None = None,
    min_length: int | None = None,
    min_properties: int | None = None,
    minimum: float | None = None,
    nullable: bool | None = None,
    pattern: str | None = None,
    properties: dict[str, Schema] | None = None,
    property_ordering: list[str] | None = None,
    required: list[str] | None = None,
    title: str | None = None,
    type: Type | None = None
)
```
---
Schema is used to define the format of input/output data.

Represents a select subset of an \[OpenAPI 3.0 schema  
object\](https://spec.openapis.org/oas/v3.0.3#schema-object). More fields may
be added in the future as needed.
